prompt: Alex (Black woman, early 40s, medium-length locs pulled back, tortoiseshell reading glasses pushed up on her head, wearing a structured charcoal blazer over a simple white top) sits at a desk surrounded by twelve different screens and devices. Each screen shows a completely different platform interface — different color schemes, different chart types, different layouts. Tangled cables and adapters connect everything. Post-it notes everywhere. Her expression is overwhelmed but determined. The scene captures the fundamental problem: every advertising platform speaks a different language, and scaling partnerships means scaling chaos. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Alex sits at a desk surrounded by twelve different platform interfaces — each screen shows a different dashboard design, different data formats, and different API documentation, with tangled cables connecting them all

prompt: A clean hexagonal hub sits at the center of the image, glowing with teal energy. Six identical, standardized connection lines radiate outward to platform icons arranged in a circle: a TV screen (CTV), a smartphone (mobile), a laptop (web), a billboard (DOOH), a shopping cart (retail media), and a microphone (podcast/audio). Each connection is exactly the same width and style — emphasizing standardization. The hub pulses with organized data flowing bidirectionally. Clean white background, minimal and precise. The visual opposite of the previous scene's chaos. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: A glowing teal hexagonal hub at center with six identical standardized connections radiating to platform icons — TV, smartphone, laptop, billboard, shopping cart, and microphone — data flowing bidirectionally

prompt: Five specialized agent robots collaborate around a shared circular workspace table. Each has a distinct tool reflecting its specialty: a sales agent holds a magnifying glass and examines product cards. A creative agent has a paintbrush and works on ad mockups. A governance agent carries a shield and checks documents. A signals agent has an antenna receiving audience data streams. In the center, a media orchestration agent coordinates, gesturing to connect the others' work. Documents and data flow smoothly between them on the table surface. Harmonious teamwork, clean teal palette, well-organized workspace. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Five specialized agent robots collaborate around a circular table — sales agent with magnifying glass, creative agent with paintbrush, governance agent with shield, signals agent with antenna, and orchestration agent coordinating in the center

prompt: A horizontal journey from left to right. On the far left, Alex (Black woman, early 40s, medium-length locs pulled back, tortoiseshell glasses on her head, structured charcoal blazer) writes a brief at a clean desk — one screen, no clutter, confident and relaxed. In the middle section, a team of agent robots processes the brief: one discovers products (magnifying glass), one builds creatives (palette), one checks governance (shield). They work in a smooth assembly line. On the far right, finished ads appear running on screens across a city skyline — billboard, phone, TV, bus shelter. The flow is clean and linear: brief to agents to live ads. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: A horizontal flow showing Alex writing a brief at a clean desk on the left, agent robots processing it in the middle, and finished ads running across a city skyline on the right

prompt: A checkpoint scene. A governance agent robot stands at a security station, inspecting campaign blueprints as they pass through. One blueprint has a green approval stamp and continues forward toward a city of screens. Another blueprint has an amber flag and is being routed along a separate glowing path to a human reviewer sitting at a nearby desk — the human examines it carefully. The checkpoint doesn't feel like a roadblock — it feels like an efficient, trustworthy filter. Campaign quality control. Clean lighting, professional atmosphere, green and amber accents on teal palette. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: A governance agent robot at a security checkpoint inspects campaign blueprints — one with a green stamp passes through to screens, another with an amber flag routes to a human reviewer at a nearby desk
